groups.theme: Effective and helpful for mental health
example_reviews: fantastic app truly helpful supporting one work problem find solution
absolutely amazing stuff cbt tool super helpful dealing inner conflict used app five min far felt immediate impact highly encourage others try
love wysa step invaluable helpful making commitment outlining day first thing morning help wysa gentle encouraging prompt insightful question suggestion

tried for about half and hour. Would ask questions then disregard all my responses by repeatedly asking me if I wanted to try a grounding or some other technique. I get blown off enough by the living. Don't need ignored by an app. lol. I actually wasn't expecting much from it, just wanted to give it a try out of curiosity. Now I know.

intake process for this service is frustratingly rigid and intrusive. It demands personal data that has nothing to do with clinical care and forced me to select from a list of confusing labels before I could even access help. I had to exit the app because there was no option to decline these unnecessary questions.

groups.theme: Comparison to human therapists or other mental health resources
example_reviews: step by step gentle clear assistance
very kind supportive and enlightening. thank you Wysa. xxx
helpful app where I can talk to for support
do not install this app if you are searching for something free because this is paid.

subscription is very expensive and at the end of the day it's a paid therapist and as for the ai pet or something it basically mindfulness I would have paid for it maybe if it was was ai with a bit of intelligence and self care that wasnt overkill but I don't see nothing new that is being offered here I'm sure some intelligent pr team is gonna have very good comeback to this thou
First time with Wysa, I love it
